segments.text: Men and brethren, I have lived in all good conscience before God until this day.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: The high priest Ananias commanded them that stood by him
God shall smite thee, thou whited wall: for sittest thou to judge me after the law, and commandest me to be smitten contrary to the law?
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: I wist not, brethren, that he was the high priest: for it is written, Thou shalt not speak evil of the ruler of thy people.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: When Paul perceived that the one part were Sadducees, and the other Pharisees, he cried out in the council,
Men and brethren, I am a Pharisee, the son of a Pharisee: of the hope and resurrection of the dead I am called in question.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Then Paul called one of the centurions unto him,
Bring this young man unto the chief captain: for he hath a certain thing to tell him.
segments.speaker: Paul

segments.text: Claudius Lysias unto the most excellent governor Felix sendeth greeting.
segments.speaker: Claudius Lysias

segments.text: I will hear thee, when thine accusers are also come.
segments.speaker: Felix

segments.text: And he commanded him to be kept in Herod's judgment hall.
